card.name: Greater Arctic Gannet
card.text: Flying When Greater Arctic Gannet enters, pressurize up to one target nontoken, nonland permanent. (Its controller sacrifices it, then creates a token copy of it.)

card.name: Ever-Growing Carp
card.text: Trample Deluge {6}{G}: If Ever-Growing Carp isn't a Leviathan, put four +1/+1 counters on it. It becomes a Leviathan in addition to its other types. (While paying this cost, each card exiled from your graveyard pays for {1}.)

card.name: Novice Crewmate
card.text: When Novice Crewmate enters, create a 4/4 Vehicle artifact token with crew 2.

card.name: Tourmaline Jelly
card.text: Tourmaline Jelly can't be blocked by tokens. Whenever Tourmaline Jelly becomes tapped, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Jagged Shelf Expedition
card.text: Create two 3/2 black Shark creature tokens with menace. Aphotic — If {R}{R} wasn't spent to cast this spell, until the end of your next turn, creatures you control have haste.

card.name: Drowned Wreck Expedition
card.text: Destroy target creature or Vehicle. Aphotic — Then if {B}{B} wasn't spent to cast this spell, create a 4/4 Vehicle artifact token with crew 2.

card.name: Off Course
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each land type among lands you control. Target nonland permanent's owner puts it on the top or bottom of their library.

card.name: Deep-Water Expedition
card.text: Create a 6/6 green Leviathan creature token with "This creature can't block tokens or be blocked by tokens." Aphotic — Then if {G}{G} wasn't spent to cast this spell, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature and Vehicle you control.

card.name: Southern Wastes Expedition
card.text: Return target creature or Vehicle card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Aphotic — If {W}{W} wasn't spent to cast this spell, put three +1/+1 counters on that permanent.

card.name: Nesting Calcicrux
card.text: Vigilance Aphotic — When Nesting Calcicrux enters, create a 1/1 red Crab creature token. If {W}{W} wasn't spent to cast it, put two +1/+1 counters on that token.

card.name: Basalt Hub Sentinel
card.text: Vigilance Aphotic — When Basalt Hub Sentinel enters, draw a card. Then if {U}{U} was spent to cast it, discard a card.

card.name: Pheremone Eel
card.text: When Pheremone Eel enters, create a tapped 1/1 blue Fish creature token with "When this creature dies, if it wasn't blocking, draw a card." Whenever another creature you control dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Pheremone Eel.

card.name: Favor of the Waves
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature or Vehicle you control. Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Levanthine Contamination
card.text: Create a token copy of target creature card in your graveyard, except it's a Leviathan in addition to its other types. You may have its base power and toughness become 6/6.

card.name: Heavenside Minesweeper
card.text: When Heavenside Minesweeper enters, look at target opponent's hand. You may exile a nonland card from it until Heavenside Minesweeper leaves the battlefield. Menace Crew 4

card.name: Desalinizer Flask
card.text: {1}, {T}, Discard a card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {5}, {T}, Exile Desalinizer Flask: Return target card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Trench-War Electrolyzer
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Lava Coil
card.text: Lava Coil deals 4 damage to target creature. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Shark Attack
card.text: Create a tapped 3/2 black Shark creature token with menace. Then you may have each player sacrifice a creature.

card.name: Sudden Swell
card.text: Choose one — • Sudden Swell deals 4 damage to target tapped creature. • Pressurize target nonland permanent you control. (Sacrifice it, then create a token copy of it.)

card.name: Leviathan's Hunger
card.text: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying. If you control a creature with power 6 or greater, draw a card.

card.name: Outcropping Oyster
card.text: Hideaway 3 (When this creature enters, look at the top three cards of your library, exile one face down, then put the rest on the bottom in a random order.) {1}, {T}: Return Outcropping Oyster or the exiled card to its owner's hand.

card.name: Springside Shrine
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Deluge {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. (While paying this cost, exiling a card from your graveyard pays for {1}.)

card.name: Stinging Artiopod
card.text: Stinging Artiopod enters tapped. Deluge {4}{B}: Return this card from your graveyard to your hand. (While paying this cost, each other card exiled from your graveyard pays for {1}.)

card.name: Heaven's Wreck
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}, {T}, Discard a card: Create a tapped artifact token named Sol Ring with "{T}: Add {C}{C}." Deluge {6}{C}{C}{C}{C}, {T}: Create a 0/0 Wraith artifact creature token. Put six +1/+1 counters on it. Activate only as a sorcery and only once. (While paying this cost, each card exiled from your graveyard pays for {1}.)

card.name: Scouting Submarine
card.text: Scouting Submarine's power is equal to the number of lands you control. Whenever Scouting Submarine enters or attacks, you may return a land card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Crew 4

card.name: Fifth-Generation Rover
card.text: Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Salvage Trawler
card.text: Flying Whenever Salvage Trawler enters or attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Crew 2 (Tap creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Conductive Current
card.text: Conductive Current deals X damage to each creature, where X is the number of land types among lands you control.

card.name: Seafloor Colonization
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Inclement Weather
card.text: Counter target spell. {2C}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Overwhelming Pressure
card.text: Gain control of target creature with mana value 4 or less until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste until end of turn. {2C}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Glassy Lagoon
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Glassy Lagoon: Search your library for a Plains or Island card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Whale Watching
card.text: Create a 4/4 blue Whale creature token with ward {2}. (Whenever it becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) {2C}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Rising Floodwaters
card.text: Look at target opponent's hand. You may exile a card from it. If you do, that opponent may search their library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into their hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Encroaching Glaciation
card.text: Return up to two target nonland permanents to their owners' hands. Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Disturbing Discovery
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or creature. Draw two cards and create a 4/4 Vehicle artifact token with crew 2.

card.name: Caprock Patrolman
card.text: Lifelink, menace Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Stinging Softshell
card.text: Deathtouch Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Defunct Flood Wall
card.text: Defender Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Pristine Shore
card.text: ({T}: Add {W}.) Pristine Shore enters tapped. {1}{W}, {T}, Discard a card or sacrifice Pristine Shore: Draw a card.

card.name: Hydrothermal Fissure
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.) As long as this card is in your graveyard, lands you control are Mountains in addition to their other types.

card.name: INS Tiresias, the Township
card.text: Whenever INS Tiresias enters or attacks, return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Crew 5

card.name: Ionia, the Glaciologist
card.text: Ionia, the Glaciologist can't be blocked as long as a card left a graveyard this turn. As long as there are six or more cards exiled with permanents you control, Ionia gets +4/+4 and is a Leviathan. Deluge {12}{U}: Draw three cards. (While paying this cost, each card exiled from your graveyard pays for {1}.)

card.name: Into the First Sea
card.text: Choose target creature you control. You may have its base power and toughness become equal to the number of lands you control until end of turn. Then, it fights up to one target creature you don't control.

card.name: Ever Deeper
card.text: Return target creature or land card from your graveyard to your hand. You may play an additional land this turn.

card.name: Trench-War Furnace Ship
card.text: When Trench-War Furnace Ship enters, return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand. Crew 3 (Tap creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Surveyor's Submersible
card.text: Whenever Surveyor's Submersible enters or attacks, draw a card, then discard a card. Crew 4 (Tap creatures you control with total power 4 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: High Caliber
card.text: When you cast this spell, if you control a creature with power 6 or greater, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy. High Caliber deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Destitute Backwater
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {B}.) Destitute Backwater enters tapped. When Destitute Backwater enters, you may discard a land card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Levanthine Accumulation
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +3/+3 and is a Leviathan in addition to its other types. Aphotic — When Levanthine Accumulation enters, if {G}{G} wasn't spent to cast it, you draw X cards and you gain X life, where X is enchanted creature's mana value.

card.name: Seafloor Material Extractor
card.text: When Seafloor Material Extractor enters, choose one — • Shuffle up to six target cards from graveyards into their owners' libraries. • Shuffle Seafloor Material Extractor and target nonland permanent into their owners' libraries.

card.name: Fogbank Sovereign
card.text: Defender Deluge — {3}{U}: Until end of turn, Fogbank Sovereign loses defender and gains flying. (While paying this cost, each card exiled from your graveyard pays for {1}.)

card.name: Cannon-Claw Shrimp
card.text: Cannon-Claw Shrimp enters with a defender counter on it if you cast it.

card.name: Coral-Crown Lobster
card.text: {T}: Add {R}. {6}, {T}: Exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn. This ability costs {X} less to activate, where X is the greatest power among creatures you control.

card.name: Cleaner Gobies
card.text: When Cleaner Gobies dies, create a 3/2 black Shark creature token with menace.

card.name: Fathom-Strand Lacemane
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each different name among lands you control and land cards in your graveyard. Fathom-Strand Lacemane can't block.

card.name: Power Relay
card.text: When Power Relay enters, draw a card. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Springside Stewards
card.text: Whenever you activate a nonmana ability during your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Springside Stewards. This ability triggers only once each turn. {3}: Surveil 1.

card.text: Flying When Whale-Eater Eagle enters, create two 1/1 white Bird creature tokens with flying. Plainscycling {2C} ({2C}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Extreme Caution
card.text: Enchant creature As long as you control enchanted creature, it gets +3/+3 and has vigilance. Otherwise, it can't attack or block. Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Material Reallocator
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or artifact or pay {2}. When Material Reallocator enters, you gain 3 life and you draw a card.

card.name: Gasp for Air
card.text: Return target nonland permanent card from your graveyard to the battlefield. When it enters, pressurize target nonland permanent you control. (Sacrifice it, then create a token copy of it.)

card.name: Gyrocaptor
card.text: Flying When Gyrocaptor enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until Gyrocaptor leaves the battlefield. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Crab Pot
card.text: When Crab Pot enters and when you sacrifice it, create a 1/1 red Crab creature token. You gain 1 life. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Crab Pot: Surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Infrastructural Failure
card.text: Turn target permanent face down. It's a Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}." Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Historical Fleet Veteran
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Deluge {7}{U}, {T}: Draw two cards. (While paying this cost, each card exiled from your graveyard pays for {1}.)

card.text: Pressurize target nonland permanent. (Its controller sacrifices it, then creates a token copy of it.) Draw a card.

card.name: Loss of Contact
card.text: Enchant creature or artifact Enchanted permanent gets -5/-0 and has "Whenever this permanent becomes tapped or is dealt damage, exile it." Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Flood Gate Expedition
card.text: Draw three cards. Aphotic — If {U}{U} wasn't spent to cast this spell, instead draw six cards, then discard three cards.

card.name: Charybdine Devotee
card.text: {T}: Surveil 1. Deluge {8}{B}: If Charybdine Devotee isn't a Leviathan, put five +1/+1 counters on it. It becomes a Leviathan in addition to its other types. (While paying this cost, each card exiled from your graveyard pays for {1}.)

card.name: Scavenging Blindworm
card.text: Aphotic — Scavenging Blindworm enters with a +1/+1 counter on it if {B}{B} wasn't spent to cast it. Lifelink, menace

card.name: First Sea Lanternfish
card.text: First Sea Lanternfish can't be blocked by creatures with total mana value 3 or less. Aphotic — When First Sea Lanternfish enters, surveil 3. Then if {B}{B} wasn't spent to cast it, draw a card.

card.name: Colossal Cuttlecraw
card.text: When Colossal Cuttlecraw enters, it deals X damage to each opponent and you gain X life, where X is the number of tokens you control. {B}, Discard this card: Pressurize target creature you control. (Sacrifice it, then create a token copy of it.)

card.name: Beneath Notice
card.text: Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn. If you controlled a Leviathan as you cast this spell, instead that creature gets -20/-20 until end of turn.

card.name: Hobbyist Engineer
card.text: Hobbyist Engineer gets +2/+0 during your main phases. When Hobbyist Engineer enters, you may sacrifice an artifact or creature. If you do, destroy target artifact.

card.name: Sandstone Hub Metatech
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may sacrifice an artifact or creature. If you do, target creature gets +3/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Stormbringer Serpent
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. Mountaincycling {2C} ({2C}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Emergency Generator
card.text: When Emergency Generator enters or leaves the battlefield, exile the top card of your library. You may play it until the end of your next turn. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice Emergency Generator: Create a 4/4 Vehicle artifact token with crew 2. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Defense Fleet Salvo
card.text: Target creature gets +3/+0 until end of turn. When it dies this turn, create a 4/4 Vehicle artifact token with crew 2. (Tap creatures you control with total power 2 or more: The token becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Seabed Excavation
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card or sacrifice a permanent. Draw two cards. Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Darkening Skies
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn. Aphotic — If {R}{R} wasn't spent to cast this spell, those creatures also gain first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Chlorocuda
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice Chlorocuda: Draw a card. This ability costs {3} less to activate if you control a Leviathan.

card.name: Backwater Fishermen
card.text: Backwater Fishermen gets +2/+0 during your main phases. Whenever Backwater Fishermen becomes tapped, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Shallows Sovereign
card.text: Vigilance, trample Shallows Sovereign can't attack unless you activated a nonmana ability this turn.

card.name: Cyan Plesiosaur

card.name: Fourth Sea Gunship
card.text: When Fourth Sea Gunship enters, it deals damage equal to the greatest power among creatures you control to target creature you don't control. Crew 3 (Tap creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Shipbuilding
card.text: Create a 4/4 Vehicle artifact token with crew 2. When you do, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature or Vehicle you control.

card.name: Towering Trenchstalker
card.text: Vigilance, ward {2} At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature token you control can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Scrapwork Submersible
card.text: Flash Whenever Scrapwork Submersible enters or attacks, you may mill two cards. If you do, target creature gets -2/-0 until end of turn. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Surfacing Scavengers
card.text: Flying Surfacing Scavengers can't block. At the beginning of your end step, if you exiled this card from your graveyard to pay a cost this turn, return it to the battlefield.

card.name: Third Sea Sunfish
card.text: Third Sea Sunfish's power is equal to the number of lands you control. Whenever you activate a nonmana ability during your turn, you may search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Ogee, Pearl Bay Poacher
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice a non-Shark creature: Create a 3/2 black Shark creature token with menace. Deluge {7}{B}{R}, Exile Ogee: Put each creature card with mana value 3 or less that was exiled from your graveyard to activate this ability onto the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery. (While paying this cost, each card exiled from your graveyard pays for {1}.)

card.name: Amei Fleet Coordinator
card.text: When Amei Fleet Coordinator enters, create two 4/4 Vehicle artifact tokens with crew 2. Artifact creatures you control have haste.

card.name: Geothermal Explosion
card.text: Destroy up to one target land. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Geothermal Explosion deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Crafty Cephalopod
card.text: Crafty Cephalopod can't be blocked. Deluge {X}{X}{U}: Crafty Cephalopod has base power and toughness X/X until end of turn. If X is 8, draw eight cards. (While paying this cost, each card exiled from your graveyard pays for {1}.)

card.name: Heavenside Minesetter
card.text: Haste When Heavenside Minesetter dies, target opponent may pay life equal to the number of cards in your graveyard. If they don't, draw a card. (This ability counts this card.)

card.name: Pearl's Hijacker
card.text: When Pearl's Hijacker dies, create a 4/4 Vehicle artifact token with crew 2.

card.name: Rusted Aero-Bomber
card.text: When Rusted Aero-Bomber enters, you may destroy all noncreature, nonland permanents. Flying Crew 1

card.name: Navigate
card.text: Search your library for up to three basic land cards and reveal them. Put one of those cards into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. Then shuffle.

card.name: Through the Flood Gate
card.text: Return target creature card, target land card, and target noncreature, nonland card from your graveyard to your hand. (You can't cast this spell unless you have legal choices for all its targets.) Exile Through the Flood Gate.

card.name: Heaven's Wreck Angler
card.text: When Heaven's Wreck Angler enters, exile the top half of your library, rounded down. When Heaven's Wreck Angler dies, put any number of cards exiled with it into your hand. You lose life equal to those cards' total mana value. Put the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Mantacore
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Mantacore, discard a card. When Mantacore dies, if it wasn't blocking, draw two cards.

card.name: Secrets of the Seafloor
card.text: Surveil 2, then draw two cards. Aphotic — Then if {U}{U} wasn't spent to cast this spell, you may cast a spell with mana value 3 or less from your hand without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Drown in Despair
card.text: Target creature gets -4/-4 until end of turn. Surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Terrifying Scale
card.text: Target creature gets +1/+1 and gains hexproof until end of turn. Untap it. If that creature is a Leviathan, it gains protection from everything until end of turn. (It can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped.)

card.name: Great Flood
card.text: Turn all nonland permanents except Arzakon planeswalkers face down. They're Trench lands with "{T}: Add {C}."

card.name: Basking Algaeback
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast for each nonmana ability you've activated this turn. Trample

card.name: Heaven's Watcher
card.text: When Heaven's Watcher enters, surveil 3. Heaven's Watcher gets +3/+0 as long as you control a Leviathan.

card.name: Hyperbaric Chamber
card.text: Deluge {5}, {T}: Draw a card. (Each card you exile from your graveyard while paying this cost pays for {1}.)

card.name: The Last Sea
card.text: ({T}: Add {W}.) The Last Sea enters tapped. {1}{W}, {T}, Discard a card: Create a 4/4 Vehicle artifact token with crew 2. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: The Third Sea
card.text: ({T}: Add {B}.) The Third Sea enters tapped. {2}{B}, {T}, Discard a card: Pressurize a nontoken creature you control. Activate only as a sorcery. (Sacrifice it, then create a token copy of it.)

card.name: The Second Sea
card.text: ({T}: Add {R}.) The Second Sea enters tapped. {2}{R}, {T}, Discard a card: When you next cast an instant or sorcery spell this turn, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Puffin Sighting
card.text: Create a 1/1 white Bird creature token with flying. {2C}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Bioprobe
card.text: If you would create one or more tokens, instead create that many tokens plus a 1/1 blue Fish creature token with "When this creature dies, if it wasn't blocking, draw a card." Crew 3

card.name: Weathered Spires
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Weathered Spires: Search your library for a Forest or Island card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Concentrated Housing
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {W}.) Concentrated Housing enters tapped. When Concentrated Housing enters, you may discard a land card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Flowering Shore
card.text: ({T}: Add {G}.) Flowering Shore enters tapped. {1}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice Flowering Shore or discard a card: Draw a card.

card.name: Rusted Reclamation
card.text: Return target creature or Vehicle card from your graveyard to your hand. {2C}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Electrofishery
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a 1/1 blue Fish creature token with "When this creature dies, if it wasn't blocking, draw a card." Whenever Electrofishery attacks, sacrifice any number of Fish that crewed it this turn. Crew 4

card.name: Electric Eel
card.text: {T}: Add {U} or {R}. Deluge {5}: Electric Eel gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the number of noncreature cards exiled with it. Activate only as a sorcery. (While paying a deluge cost, each card exiled from your graveyard pays for {1}.)

card.name: Pablo, Creature Collector
card.text: Trample Whenever Pablo attacks, exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn. Each creature you control gets +1/+1 for each card exiled with that creature.

card.name: Craggy Shore
card.text: ({T}: Add {R}.) Craggy Shore enters tapped. {1}{R}, {T}: Discard a card or sacrifice Craggy Shore: Draw a card.

card.name: Igneous Flats
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Igneous Flats: Search your library for a Swamp or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Biocartography Unit
card.text: Flash When Biocartography Unit enters, if it's your turn, target opponent discards a card. If it's not your turn, Biocartography Unit gains deathtouch until end of turn.

card.name: Internal Inversion
card.text: Return target nonland permanent card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Destroy up to one target permanent with greater mana value than that card.

card.name: Storm of the Century
card.text: You may sacrifice a creature. When you do, exile up to one target nonland permanent. You may sacrifice a noncreature, nonland permanent. When you do, draw four cards. You may sacrifice a land. When you do, create a 6/6 green Leviathan creature token with "This creature can't block tokens or be blocked by tokens."

card.name: Crumbling Custodian
card.text: {2C}: Add one mana of any color. Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Leviathan Whalefall
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.) As long as this card is in your graveyard, lands you control are Plains in addition to their other types.

card.name: Majestic Manatee
card.text: Trample Whenever Majestic Manatee attacks, you may play an additional land this turn. Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Schooling
card.text: Create two 1/1 blue Fish creature tokens with "When this creature dies, if it wasn't blocking, draw a card."

card.name: Esoteric Experiment
card.text: Draw a card. {2C}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card. Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Vibrant Reef
card.text: Defender {T}: Untap target land you control. {3}, {T}: Untap up to one Forest you control. Repeat this process for each other land type among lands you control.

card.name: Glimmering Reef
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Glimmering Reef: Search your library for an Island or Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Fragile Floodwall
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. When you cast a spell with mana value 3 or less from your hand, turn Fragile Floodwall face down. It's a colorless Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}."

card.name: Boiling Crater
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Boiling Crater: Search your library for an Island or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Manufacturing Plant
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {G}.) Manufacturing Plant enters tapped. When Manufacturing Plant enters, you may discard a land card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Prodigal Pups
card.text: Whenever Prodigal Pups attacks, discard your hand, then draw three cards. Deluge {5}: Copy target instant or sorcery spell you control. You may choose new targets for the copy. (While paying this cost, each card exiled from your graveyard pays for {1}.)

card.name: Volatile Bioreactor
card.text: Lifelink, deathtouch, vigilance, haste When Volatile Bioreactor dies, it deals X damage to any target, where X is its power.

card.name: Search and Rescue
card.text: Choose one or both — • Return target artifact card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. • Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Heavenside Radiation
card.text: Return up to one target creature card with mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield, where X is the number of lands you control. Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: History Repeats
card.text: Return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand. Exile History Repeats. Then if you own exactly four cards in exile named History Repeats, take an extra turn after this one.

card.name: Mesmeric Mimic
card.text: Changeling (This card is every creature type.) Octopi you control can't be blocked. As long as this card is in your graveyard and you control an Island, creatures you control and creature cards in your graveyard are every creature type.

card.name: Urban Beachcomber
card.text: Haste {CR}: Urban Beachcomber gets +1/+0 until end of turn. If its power is 6 or greater, it gains trample until end of turn. Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Scuttling Swarm
card.text: Flash Menace Aphotic — When Scuttling Swarm enters, target creature you don't control gets -2/-2 until end of turn. If {B}{B} wasn't spent to cast it, instead that creature gets -6/-6 until end of turn.

card.name: Dangerous Waters
card.text: Create a 3/2 black Shark creature token with menace. You may cast this card from your graveyard. At the beginning of the end step, if this card is in your graveyard, exile it.

card.name: Plasma Pulverizer
card.text: Plasma Pulverizer gets +2/+0 for each land type among lands you control. Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Trench Trawler
card.text: Whenever Trench Trawler enters or attacks, mill three cards. Lifelink Crew 3 (Tap creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Descending into Heaven
card.text: Target opponent discards two cards. Aphotic — If {B}{B} wasn't spent to cast this spell, create a 0/0 Wraith artifact creature token and put X +1/+1 counters on it, where X is five minus the total mana value of cards discarded this way.

card.name: Swallowed Whole
card.text: Enchant creature you control When Swallowed Whole enters, exile target artifact, enchantment, or creature with toughness less than enchanted creature's power an opponent controls until Swallowed Whole leaves the battlefield.

card.name: At the Bottom of the World
card.text: Blue mana can't be spent on X. Draw X cards.

card.name: Paean to the Sovereigns
card.text: Affinity for tokens (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each token you control.) Create a 6/6 green Leviathan creature token with "This creature can't block tokens or be blocked by tokens."

card.name: Nitrogen Narcosis
card.text: Pressurize target nonland permanent you control. Then, create a token that's a copy of a token you control. (To pressurize it, sacrifice it, then create a token copy of it.)

card.name: Dismemberin' Doris
card.text: Lifelink, vigilance When Dismemberin' Doris enters, target creature gets -5/-5 until end of turn. If you controlled that creature, you lose X life and you draw X cards, where X is its mana value.

card.name: Seasoned Aquanaut
card.text: Creatures you control have protection from tokens. (They can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped by tokens.) When Seasoned Aquanaut enters, pressurize up to one target nontoken, nonland permanent. (Its controller sacrifices it, then creates a token copy of it.)

card.name: Whalesong Signals
card.text: When Whalesong Signals enters, search your library for a card with an activated ability, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. At the beginning of your end step, if you activated a nonmana ability of a permanent, a card in your hand, and a card in your graveyard this turn, create a 4/4 blue Whale creature token with ward {2}.

card.name: Migratory Mallards
card.text: Flying, vigilance When Migratory Mallards enters, you may search your library for a Plains, Swamp, or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Reef-Frilled Polyphon
card.text: No more than one mana of each color may be spent to cast this spell. Reef-Frilled Polyphon enters with three times X +1/+1 counters on it. Reef-Frilled Polyphon has hexproof if it hasn't dealt damage yet.

card.name: Seabed Minerologist
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a land. You may play an additional land on each of your turns. {1}: Seabed Minerologist gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: The Fleet Must Grow
card.text: Untap all creatures you control. Create X 4/4 Vehicle artifact tokens with crew 2.

card.name: Glacial Valley
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Glacial Valley: Search your library for a Plains or Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Open Ocean
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Open Ocean: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {3}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Search your library for up to three cards named Open Ocean, reveal them, put them into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Saline Pools
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Saline Pools: Search your library for a Mountain or Plains card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Seagrass Shallows
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Seagrass Shallows: Search your library for a Forest or Plains card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Old-Growth Mangal
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Old-Growth Mangal: Search your library for a Swamp or Forest card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Alpine Lakeside
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Alpine Lakeside: Search your library for a Mountain or Forest card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Professor Paula Needler
card.text: Each card in your graveyard has the activated abilities of each other card in your graveyard. {2C}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Generational Decay
card.text: Create a 0/0 Wraith artifact creature token. Put X +1/+1 counters on it. Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Walais, the Charybdine Gate
card.text: {T}: Add {C} or {G}. When you do, mill a card. Non-Leviathan creatures you control have "Deluge — {12}: Put six +1/+1 counters on this creature. It becomes a Leviathan in addition to its other types. Activate only as a sorcery." (While paying a deluge cost, each card you exile from your graveyard pays for {1}.)

card.name: Levanthine Cluster
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice a permanent: Search your library for a card with a basic land type, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. {C}{W}{U}{B}{R}{G}, Exile Levanthine Cluster: Draw three cards. You may put a Leviathan card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Boiler Maintenance Tech
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a 4/4 Vehicle artifact token with crew 2.

card.name: Biomass Augur
card.text: Deathtouch, lifelink You may cast creature spells from among cards exiled with permanents you control. Deluge {4}{B}{B}, {T}: Each opponent loses 4 life and you gain 4 life. (While paying this cost, each card exiled from your graveyard pays for {1}.)

card.name: Nebula, the Siltseeder
card.text: This spell can't be countered. When Nebula, the Siltseeder enters, you may discard your hand. If you do, draw a card for each land type among lands that produced mana spent to cast it. Whenever you draw a card, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Eye-Eater Parasitoids
card.text: Whenever a player casts a spell, if two or more mana of the same color was spent to cast it, counter that spell unless its controller pays {1}.

card.name: Impassable Wave
card.text: Mill a card, then you may deluge {X}. When you do, counter target spell unless its controller pays {X}. (While paying a deluge cost, each card exiled from your graveyard pays for {1}.)

card.name: Invoke Insignificance
card.text: Each player pressurizes a nontoken, nonland permanent they control. (They sacrifice it, then create a token copy of it.) Destroy all tokens.

card.name: Spatial Contortion
card.text: Target creature gets +3/-3 until end of turn.

card.name: Abyssal Inkwinder
card.text: Deathtouch, lifelink Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard during your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Abyssal Inkwinder. Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Munitions Scavenger
card.text: Trample, vigilance, ward {2} Deluge {8}{G}{G}: Create a token that's a copy of Munitions Scavenger. Activate only as a sorcery. (While paying this cost, each card exiled from your graveyard pays for {1}.)

card.name: Islet Shore
card.text: ({T}: Add {U}.) Islet Shore enters tapped. {1}{U}, {T}, Discard a card or sacrifice Islet Shore: Draw a card.

card.name: Ruined Shore
card.text: ({T}: Add {B}.) Ruined Shore enters tapped. {1}{B}, {T}, Discard a card or sacrifice Ruined Shore: Draw a card.

card.name: Martis, Network Weaver
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, pressurize target permanent. (Its controller sacrifices it, then creates a token copy of it.) Tokens you control are 4/4 Robot artifact creatures in addition to their other types.

card.name: Amei Salvagers
card.text: When Amei Salvagers enters, surveil 3. Deluge {3}: Amei Salvagers gets +3/-3 until end of turn. Then if it has two or more instant or sorcery cards exiled with it, it can't be blocked this turn. (While paying this cost, each card exiled from your graveyard pays for {1}.)

card.name: Interaction Module
card.text: When Interaction Module enters or dies, you may cast a noncreature spell with mana value 4 or less from your hand without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Thorough Dissection
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or pay {2}. Mill six cards. You may return up to two creature cards from among the milled cards to your hand.

card.name: Hydrocyclist
card.text: When Hydrocyclist enters, draw a card. Hydrocyclist gets +3/+0 during your main phases.

card.name: Sea Bass
card.text: Sea Bass can't be blocked by tokens. Whenever Sea Bass attacks, it gets +4/+0 until end of turn if you control a creature with power 6 or greater.

card.name: Emissary of the Far Sea
card.text: {T}: Untap another target permanent. {3}, Discard this card: Search your library for a legendary card that's a land, Merfolk, Leviathan, or Kiora, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Playful Platypus
card.text: {1}, {T}: Pressurize target nontoken permanent you control. Activate only as a sorcery. (Sacrifice that permanent, then create a token copy of it.) As long as you control three or more differently named tokens, Playful Platypus can't be blocked.

card.name: Terraformer's Globe
card.text: When Terraformer's Globe enters, draw a card. {T}: Target land you control becomes the basic land type of your choice until end of turn.

card.name: Reproducible Experiment
card.text: You may cast target artifact, instant, or sorcery card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard without paying its mana cost. Exile Reproducible Experiment.

card.name: Flock of Seagulls
card.text: Flying When Flock of Seagulls enters, create a 1/1 white Bird creature token with flying and draw a card.

card.name: Filter Feeder
card.text: Trample Filter Feeder enters tapped. Filter Feeder doesn't untap during your untap step. Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, untap Filter Feeder.

card.name: Twenty-Mile Moray
card.text: Whenever a nontoken creature you control becomes blocked or becomes the target of a spell or ability, you may pressurize that creature. (Sacrifice it, then create a token copy of it.) {2C}, Discard this card: Pressurize target creature you control.

card.name: Stalwart of the Last Sea
card.text: Flash Whenever another permanent enters, if it was cast, you may exile it. If you do, return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of their next upkeep.

card.name: View-from-Above
card.text: Flying When View-from-Above enters, you gain 5 life. Cycling {2C} ({2C}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Harrowing Escape
card.text: Pressurize target creature you control. The token enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. (To pressurize a permanent, sacrifice it, then create a token copy of it.)

card.name: Danger Close
card.text: This spell costs {3} less to cast if you control a creature with power 6 or greater. Discard your hand, then draw six cards. You may play an additional land this turn.

card.name: Kiora, Far-Sea Tempest
card.text: When Kiora enters, mill six cards. You may put a creature card and/or a land card from among the milled cards into your hand. Whenever one or more Merfolk and/or Leviathan creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, put that many loyalty counters on Kiora. Then you may transform her. --- (Back): Hurricane Kiora

card.name: Hurricane Kiora
card.text: --- (Front): Kiora, Far-Sea Tempest

card.name: Oblivion Sanctuary
card.text: Cards in your graveyard have sunken. (You may play them face down from your graveyard as tapped Trench lands with "{T}: Add {C}.") {C}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Oceanography
card.text: When Oceanography enters, draw a card, then you may play an additional land this turn. Lands you control enter untapped.

card.name: Irrigated Earthworks
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {U}.) Irrigated Earthworks enters tapped. When Irrigated Earthworks enters, you may discard a land card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Monumental Dam
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {R}.) Monumental Dam enters tapped. When Monumental Dam enters, you may discard a land card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Entertainment Hall
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {R}.) Entertainment Hall enters tapped. When Entertainment Hall enters, you may discard a land card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Municipal Library
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {U}.) Municipal Library enters tapped. When Municipal Library enters, you may discard a land card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Waterfront Edifice
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {W}.) Waterfront Edifice enters tapped. When Waterfront Edifice enters, you may discard a land card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Wastewater Facility
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {B}.) Wastewater Facility enters tapped. When Wastewater Facility enters, you may discard a land card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Remote Laboratory
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {G}.) Remote Laboratory enters tapped. When Remote Laboratory enters, you may discard a land card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Terraforming Overseer
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you draw a card and you lose 1 life. At the beginning of your end step, if cards were put into your graveyard from the battlefield, your hand, and your library this turn, search your library for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Adipose Hibernator
card.text: When Adipose Hibernator enters, surveil 4. Adipose Hibernator enters tapped with two stun counters on it you cast it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: Odd Globster
card.text: Odd Globster enters tapped. Whenever a non-Ooze creature you control enters, you may exile Odd Globster from your graveyard. When that creature dies, return Odd Globster to the battlefield.

card.name: Personal Propeller
card.text: Personal Propeller can't be blocked by creatures with power 3 or greater. When Personal Propeller enters, draw a card. Crew 1

card.name: Pearl Bay Torpedo
card.text: Aphotic — When Pearl Bay Torpedo enters, if {R}{R} wasn't spent to cast it, Vehicles you control become artifact creatures until end of turn. Haste Crew 2

card.name: Barotrauma
card.text: Deluge {2}: Each player sacrifices a creature. (While paying this cost, each card exiled from your graveyard pays for {1}.) At the beginning of the end step, sacrifice Barotrauma.

card.name: Tree-of-the-Sea
card.text: Tree-of-the-Sea enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. If it wasn't cast, X is equal to the number of lands you control. Vigilance, trample, reach When Tree-of-the-Sea dies, mill cards equal to its power. You may put one of the milled cards into your hand.

card.name: Submarine Snapper
card.text: Menace Whenever Submarine Snapper or another creature you control dies, target opponent may sacrifice a creature or discard a card. If they don't, they lose 3 life. {1}{B}, Discard this card: Target opponent sacrifices a creature.

card.name: Starfall Narwhal
card.text: Double strike Starfall Narwhal gets +1/+0 for each nonmana activated ability among permanents you control. {2}{W}, Discard this card: Exile target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Charybdine City-Breaker
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, it gets +8/+8 until end of turn.

card.name: Architecture Winder
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each noncreature, nonland permanent you control and each noncreature, nonland card in your graveyard.

card.name: Spawning Salmon
card.text: When Spawning Salmon dies, if it attacked this turn, create a token that's a copy of it. {2}{BR}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains this card's other abilities. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Walrus Huddle
card.text: {GW}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery. {GW}, Discard this card: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. {GW}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Abyssal Grotto
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.) As long as this card is in your graveyard, lands you control are Swamps in addition to their other types.

card.name: Drowned City
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.) As long as this card is in your graveyard, lands you control are Islands in addition to their other types.

card.name: Seagrass Colony
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.) As long as this card is in your graveyard, lands you control are Forests in addition to their other types.

card.name: Oreseeker Probe
card.text: Oreseeker Probe has first strike during your turn. Artifacts and lands you control have "{T}: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery."

card.name: Humble Houseboat
card.text: Vigilance {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to activate abilities or cast spells with activated abilities. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Pearl Bay Dockworkers
card.text: Whenever another nontoken creature or artifact you control enters, pressurize it. (Sacrifice it, then create a token copy of it.) Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, Pearl Bay Dockworkers deals 1 damage to any non-Pirate target.

card.name: Deep-Sea Gigantism
card.text: Target creature gets +4/+4 and gains trample until end of turn. {2}{R}{G}, Exile Deep-Sea Gigantism from your graveyard: Put four +1/+1 counters and a trample counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Mole Frog
card.text: When Mole Frog enters, surveil 2. Deluge {8}: Create two 1/1 blue Fish creature tokens with "When this creature dies, if it wasn't blocking, draw a card." (Each card you exile from your graveyard while paying this cost pays for {1}.)

card.name: Sovereign in Repose
card.text: Whenever Sovereign in Repose enters or attacks, you gain 2 life and you draw a card. Sovereign in Repose can't attack or block unless a card has left your graveyard this turn.

card.name: Sandstone Hub Expansionist
card.text: Sandstone Hub Expansionist gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control. Trenches you control are artifacts in addition to their other types. Creatures you control with power 6 or greater have haste.

card.name: Infested Wraith
card.text: Deathtouch When Infested Wraith dies, if it wasn't blocking, each opponent loses 4 life and you gain 4 life. Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Cloud-Drinker Heron
card.text: Flying, vigilance Cloud-Drinker Heron can't attack unless two or more permanents have entered this turn. {2}{W}, Discard this card: Create two 1/1 white Bird creature tokens with flying.

card.name: Dolphin Diver
card.text: Lifelink When Dolphin Diver enters, surveil 1. At the beginning of your second main phase, pressurize up to one target tapped creature you control. (Sacrifice it, then create a token copy of it.)

card.name: ADV Mopane, Top of the Line
card.text: Whenever ADV Mopane enters or attacks, reveal cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card. You may cast it without paying its mana cost. If you don't, put it into your hand. Put each land card revealed this way onto the battlefield. Crew 2

card.name: Vehicle Token WDW
card.text: Crew 2 (Tap creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Bird Token WDW
card.text: Flying

card.name: Shark Token WDW
card.text: Menace

card.name: Fish Token WDW
card.text: When this creature dies, if it wasn't blocking, draw a card.

card.name: Jansette, Wayfinder-Captain
card.text: Vigilance When Jansette enters, you may search your library for a card with sunken, put it into your graveyard, then shuffle. {4}{C}, {T}: Exchange your hand and graveyard. Activate only if Jansette dealt combat damage to a player this turn.

card.name: Whale Token WDW
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)

card.name: Leviathan Token WDW
card.text: This creature can't block tokens and can't be blocked by tokens.

card.name: Hadal Harpoonist
card.text: When Hadal Harpoonist enters, target creature you control gets +2/+1 and gains haste until end of turn. Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Martis' Ambassador
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each card type among cards that left your graveyard this turn. Vigilance, trample, haste Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: The Fourth Sea
card.text: ({T}: Add {U}.) The Fourth Sea enters tapped. {U}, {T}, Discard a card: Target creature with mana value equal to the discarded card's mana value can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: The First Sea
card.text: ({T}: Add {G}.) The First Sea enters tapped. {8}{G}{G}, {T}, Discard a card: Create a 6/6 green Leviathan creature token with "This creature can't block tokens or be blocked by tokens." Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Drowner of Coastlines
card.text: When Drowner of Coastlines enters, you may turn a nonland permanent you control face down. If you do, turn target nonland permanent an opponent controls face down. Permanents turned face down this way are colorless Trench lands with "{T}: Add {C}."

card.name: Saddled Scuttleback
card.text: When Saddled Scuttleback enters, you may search your library for a Crab, Fish, Jellyfish, Kraken, Leviathan, Merfolk, Nautilus, Octopus, Otter, Oyster, Pirate, Seal, Serpent, Shark, Shrimp, Sponge, Squid, Starfish, Trilobite, Turtle, Whale, or Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Sessile Superstructure
Krizkiax, Cryptid Drifter
card.text: You may play an additional land on each of your turns. Trample, haste At the beginning of your end step, return a permanent you control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Glimmershell Nautilus
card.text: Trample, haste When Glimmershell Nautilus enters, you may exile six cards from your graveyard. If a white card, a blue card, a black card, a red card, a green card, and a colorless card were exiled this way, create a token that's a copy of it.

card.name: Triton, the Revenant
card.text: Whenever you cast your first spell each turn, sacrifice a permanent. Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, draw two cards. Whenever you cast your third spell each turn, create three 3/2 black Shark creature tokens with menace.

card.name: Defender of the Last Soul
card.text: Double strike Deluge {7}: Untap Defender of the Last Soul. Put a +1/+1 counter on it. If it's your combat phase, there is an additional combat phase after this phase. (While paying this cost, each card you exile from your graveyard pays for {1}.)

card.name: Hole in the Bottom of the Sea
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. When you do, you may put a land card exiled with Hole in the Bottom of the Sea onto the battlefield. {5}, {T}: Search your library for any number of land cards, exile them, then shuffle.

set.picurl: https://msefieldtest.github.io/sets/WDW-files/img/243_Hole in the Bottom of the Sea.jpg

card.name: Trench WDW
card.text: You can cover a face-down card with sunken with this reminder card. {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Roseus Rex
card.text: Trample You may cast spells with power 6 or greater without paying their mana costs. Whenever Roseus Rex deals combat damage to a player, you may discard your hand. If you do, draw cards equal to the damage dealt.

card.name: Slippery Seals
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if a creature entered under your control this turn. This spell costs {2} less to cast if a creature died under your control this turn. When Slippery Seals enters, exile target nonland permanent you don't control until Slippery Seals leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Patient Crocodile
card.text: Deathtouch During your turn, Patient Crocodile has hexproof. Whenever Patient Crocodile attacks, mill cards equal to the number of cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Drifting Remora
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you control six or more lands or a creature with power 6 or greater, draw a card. Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Encounter with the Vast
card.text: Search your library for a card with mana value 6 or greater, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Crushproof Isopod
card.text: Crushproof Isopod can't be sacrificed. (If it's pressurized, you still get a copy.) Crushproof Isopod gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control. When Crushproof Isopod enters, draw a card.

card.name: Corroded Opus
card.text: Trample Corroded Opus can't block. Deluge {7}: Return Corroded Opus from your graveyard to the battlefield. Colored mana can't be spent to activate this ability. (While paying this cost, each other card exiled from your graveyard pays for {1}.)

card.name: Anthromorph Anomaly
card.text: Creature cards in graveyards have sunken. Nonbasic lands enter tapped and have "If this permanent would leave the battlefield, exile it instead." Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: INS Attica, Built and Rebuilt
card.text: Whenever another creature dies, exile it. Each opponent loses 1 life. When INS Attica dies, if it was a creature, for each permanent card exiled with it, create a token that's a copy of that card, then sacrifice that token. Crew 4

card.name: Charybdis, the Lone
card.text: Vigilance, deathtouch, trample (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it. The remaining damage is excess.) When Charybdis, the Lone enters, each player chooses a nonland permanent they control. Turn all nonland permanents not chosen this way face down. They're Trench lands with "{T}: Add {C}."

card.name: Pearl, the Last Pirate
card.text: At the beginning of each end step, untap each legendary permanent you control. When Pearl, the Last Pirate enters, exile up to one target creature or Vehicle card from a graveyard. Create a token that's a copy of that card, except it's a legendary Vehicle artifact named The Pearly Gates. If it doesn't have crew, it gains crew 4.

card.name: Sediment Thresher
card.text: First strike, haste Artifacts you control have "Whenever this artifact becomes tapped, you may untap it. Do this only once each turn."

card.name: Sol Ring WDW
card.text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.

card.name: Harpooning Cruiser
card.text: Trample, lifelink When Harpooning Cruiser enters, it deals X damage to up to one target creature, where X is the number of artifacts you control. Crew 4 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 4 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Ichthyosaur
card.text: Ichthyosaur can't be blocked by tokens. Whenever Ichthyosaur attacks, pressurize up to one target nonland permanent. (Its controller sacrifices it, then creates a token copy of it.)

card.name: Last-Sea Lamprey
card.text: Whenever you activate a nonmana ability, tap up to one target creature an opponent controls. {2C}, Exile Last-Sea Lamprey from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Collector of Cathedrals
card.text: Double strike, vigilance, trample Exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, if this card is in your graveyard and you control a Forest, a Plains, and an Island, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Stain on the Threshold
card.text: Whenever your graveyard is empty, mill seven cards. Do this only once each turn. Sunken (You may play this card face down from your graveyard as a tapped Trench land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Kiora's Ruinous Tide
card.text: Flash When Kiora's Ruinous Tide enters and at the beginning of your end step, pressurize each other nontoken, nonland permanent you control. (To pressurize a permanent, sacrifice it, then create a token copy of it.)

card.name: Minefield Navigation
card.text: Discard any number of cards, then draw that many cards plus one. Aphotic — If {R}{R} wasn't spent to cast this spell, create a 0/0 Wraith artifact creature token and put X +1/+1 counters on it, where X is the number of card types among cards in your graveyard.
